segments.text: Welcome to DormTell. My dorm my home. Today we'll walk you through our dormitory operations automation
platform. DormTell eliminates manual processes and gives dormitory owners complete visibility into
their business from first inquiry to final move out. If you're managing a dormitory today, you know
the chaos. Inquiries are scattered across Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, and Walkins. Billing calculations
are done in spreadsheets, prone to errors, payment reconciliation from G-Cache, Maya, and bank
transfers is a nightmare. There's no real-time visibility into occupancy or revenue and move out
processes get lost in paperwork and chat threads. DormTell solves all of this with five integrated
modules that cover your entire workflow. Module one handles inquiry management across all channels.
Module two provides digital onboarding from reservation to move in. Module three automates your
billing calculations. Module four handles payment reconciliation in real-time and Module five manages
the entire move out processing pipeline. Let's start with the operations dashboard. At a glance,
you can see today's revenue of 36,800 pesos from five transactions, six new inquiries awaiting
response, 18 total reservations across all buildings, for pending bills needing manager approval,
three scheduled move-ins coming up, and two active move-outs in progress. Quick action buttons
let you jump directly to any task. Module one is inquiry management. DormTell captures leads from
every channel, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, walk-ins, and phone calls. Each inquiry is automatically scored.
Sentiment analysis rates the tone from zero to one. Let's scoring from zero to 100 prioritizes
who to follow up with first. The pipeline tracks each inquiry from new to responded,
to escalated, to converted into a paying resident. Module two is digital onboarding.
Turn an inquiry into a move-in within minutes. Our smart room search lets you type to filter across
25 rooms in three buildings. Tower A, Tower B, and Tower C. The reservation form includes
government ID verification. Once submitted, the system automatically generates a payment link
for G-Cache or Maya. And when payment is confirmed, one click activates the move-in. Module three
is automated billing. Say goodbye to spreadsheet errors. Staff submit meter readings per building,
and the system auto calculates each resident's share. Rent plus electric plus water plus other
charges. A built-in approval workflow ensures manager sign-off before distribution. And variance
detection flags, any consumption anomalies for review. Catching issues before bills go out.
Module four is payment reconciliation. Every payso is accounted for. Dormtel supports G-Cache,
Maya, bank transfers, and cash payments. Webhooks capture real-time payments instantly.
The Daily Sales Report shows today's total. 36,800 pesos across five transactions.
Payments are auto-matched to resident buildings, and any unmatched payments are flagged for manual
reconciliation. Module five is move-out processing. When a resident needs to leave,
the structured workflow ensures nothing falls through the cracks. It starts with a formal
request, then clearance generation for room inspection. Final billing is computed with
charges. Any refund due is processed and tracked, and every step is logged in a complete audit trail
for your records. Dormtel is ready to automate your dormitory. The platform currently manages 25 rooms,
18 active residents, 12 live inquiries across five fully integrated modules. Visit dormtel.curiosity.cloud
to explore the live demo in your browser. Thank you for watching,
and we look forward to helping you transform your dormitory operations.
